protocol_notes: Doctor advised to run SS-31 first before MOTS-c to repair mitochondrial wall before introducing SS-31 (which increases ATP production/ROS). Compares to putting Ferrari engine in pinto on cinder blocks. Notes this is personal understanding, not doctor's analysis. States order may be less important if mitochondria is healthy but significantly important for ME/CFS patients with mitochondrial impairment. Doctor willing to experiment with peptides for cutting edge science.
